div.head: Memorandum of a Conversation between the Secretary of State and the Mexican Chargé (Diego-Fernandez), April 22, 1920
div.p: The Chargé d’Affaires of Mexico called to discuss the friction and disorders along the border, emphasizing the desire that the Carranza Government be permitted to import arms and ammunition and renewed his warnings against the irregular shipment of arms and ammunition which are supposed to be reaching the rebellious elements in Northern Mexico.
